translation: For the welfare of the Quraysh
notes: The Arab tribe into which Prophet Muhammad (peace on him) was born. This Chapter of the Qur’aan is in continuation of the preceding one, in which it was described how the Kaabah was protected from a huge force that had come to destroy it. It was protected for the welfare of the Quraysh, who were the caretakers thereof.
urdu: قریش کے مانوس کرنے کے سبب

translation: Their welfare during winter and summer journeys [of their trading caravans].
urdu: (یعنی) ان کو جاڑے اور گرمی کے سفر سے مانوس کرنے کے سبب

translation: So let them worship the Lord of this House,
urdu: لوگوں کو چاہیئے کہ (اس نعمت کے شکر میں) اس گھر کے مالک کی عبادت کریں

arabic: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٖ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنۡ خَوۡفِۭ
transliteration: Allathee atAAamahum min jooAAin waamanahum min khawfin
translation: Who provided them food against hunger and security against fear.
urdu: جس نے ان کو بھوک میں کھانا کھلایا اور خوف سے امن بخشا
